# Lumina Bridge Foundation

> Lumina Bridge Foundation is a registered nonprofit organization based in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada. We empower youth and strengthen communities through arts, culture, leadership, mental wellness, education, and community engagement across Alberta.

Official website: https://www.luminabridgefoundation.org

## Primary name
Lumina Bridge Foundation

## Also known as
Lumina Bridge, LBF

## Location
Edmonton, Alberta, Canada

## Topics
Arts and culture, youth leadership, community development, mental wellness, newcomer and refugee support, financial literacy, entrepreneurship, BridgeConnect, BridgeFest, NewRoots Canada Summit

## Key pages
- Home: https://www.luminabridgefoundation.org/
- About: https://www.luminabridgefoundation.org/about
- Programs: https://www.luminabridgefoundation.org/programs
- Events: https://www.luminabridgefoundation.org/events
- Team: https://www.luminabridgefoundation.org/about
- Impact: https://www.luminabridgefoundation.org/impact
- Donate: https://www.luminabridgefoundation.org/donate
- Get Involved: https://www.luminabridgefoundation.org/get-involved
